name: @microservices-sh/identity
description: User identity (accounts, login, sessions) on Better Auth, bridging to @microservices-sh/auth for service tokens. Plan 26 prototype (draft).
//peerNote: better-auth + drizzle-orm are provided by the consuming app (see README 'Wiring guide'), NOT declared here: pnpm auto-install-peers would otherwise drag better-auth@1.6 (peer zod^4 / drizzle^0.45) into this zod^3 / drizzle^0.41 monorepo. Pin a compatible better-auth at app-install time — see plans/26 §9.
